headline: Texas Pacific Land Governance Shifts After Murray Stahl’s Passing
summary: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) announced the passing of board member Murray Stahl, who was also CEO and Chairman of its largest shareholder, Horizon Kinetics. Stahl's death represents a leadership change for both the company and a major investor with significant influence on its governance. The event highlights potential shifts in how Texas Pacific Land and Horizon Kinetics engage on board decisions and long term priorities. Texas Pacific Land operates primarily as a land and resource...
